# ARTIGRAM Example

This environment already contains a concrete LLM Wiki example at:

- `$HOME/ARTIGRAM-TG-DESKTOP/ARTIGRAM-WIKI`

Use it as a reference for:

- `WIKI-SCHEMA.md` as the canonical contract
- `wiki/index.md` as the navigation entry point
- `wiki/log.md` as the append-only operations log
- whole-workspace corpus policy
- source/entity/concept/analysis page separation

Useful files:

- `$HOME/ARTIGRAM-TG-DESKTOP/ARTIGRAM-WIKI/WIKI-SCHEMA.md`
- `$HOME/ARTIGRAM-TG-DESKTOP/ARTIGRAM-WIKI/wiki/index.md`
- `$HOME/ARTIGRAM-TG-DESKTOP/ARTIGRAM-WIKI/wiki/log.md`

Do not assume every LLM Wiki follows this exact schema. Read the target vault's
local contract first if one exists.
